mapper.select: SELECT d.drone_id, d.status, dl.battery_pct AS battery FROM drones d JOIN drone_latest dl ON dl.drone_id = d.drone_id WHERE d.drone_id = #{droneId} AND d.status = 'idle' FOR UPDATE OF d
mapper.update: UPDATE drones SET status = 'assigned' WHERE drone_id = #{droneId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mission_assignments(mission_id, drone_id, status, assigned_at) VALUES (#{missionId}, #{droneId}, 'assigned', NOW())
mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE route AS ( SELECT src_drone_id, dst_drone_id, 1 AS hops, CAST(src_drone_id AS VARCHAR) || '->' || CAST(dst_drone_id AS VARCHAR) AS path FROM network_links_snapshot WHERE src_drone_id = #{srcDroneId} AND is_active = TRUE UNION ALL SELECT r.src_drone_id, nl.dst_drone_id, r.hops + 1, r.path || '->' || CAST(nl.dst_drone_id AS VARCHAR) FROM network_links_snapshot nl JOIN route r ON nl.src_drone_id = r.dst_drone_id WHERE nl.is_active = TRUE AND r.hops < 10 ) SELECT * FROM route WHERE dst_drone_id = 0 ORDER BY hops LIMIT 5

SELECT d.drone_id, d.serial_no, COUNT(ma.assign_id) AS completed_missions, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(ma.assign_id) DESC) AS rank, ROUND(AVG(dl.battery_pct)::numeric, 1) AS avg_battery FROM drones d LEFT JOIN mission_assignments ma ON ma.drone_id = d.drone_id AND ma.status = 'done' LEFT JOIN drone_latest dl ON dl.drone_id = d.drone_id WHERE d.drone_id != 0 GROUP BY d.drone_id, d.serial_no ORDER BY rank
